name: White Bean Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Cook and stir onion and garlic in margarine in a 4-quart Dutch oven until the onion is tender.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients, except chopped tomato and tortilla chips. Heat to boiling; reduce heat.
4. Cover and simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in the chopped tomato and tortilla chips.
